description: Product requirements for Otter v0.0.2 - UI/UX improvements, universal scanning, and feature completeness

milestones.title: JSON Viewer for Artifacts
milestones.description: When a user clicks 'Open' on an artifact (sbom.json, vulnerabilities.json, etc.), show the JSON in a readable, formatted viewer instead of dumping raw JSON in the browser tab.
requirements: Build an in-app JSON viewer component (collapsible tree, syntax highlighting, search)
Keep it simple and readable - inspired by jsonviewer.stack.hu but lighter
Support large files (1MB+ SBOMs) without freezing the UI
Open in a modal or dedicated route, not a new browser tab
Copy-to-clipboard button for the full JSON or selected nodes

milestones.title: Fix Registry Name Overlap in Overview
milestones.description: The registry name (e.g. 'index.docker.io') is not visible - it gets hidden under the next div. The scan summary layout with Registry/Repository cards overlaps on smaller screens.
requirements: Fix the Overview tab scan summary grid so Registry and Repository values don't overflow
Ensure text truncation with tooltip on hover for long values
Test on 13-14 inch laptop screens (1366x768, 1440x900)
StatCard values should ellipsis-truncate rather than push layout

milestones.title: Universal Public Image Scanning
milestones.description: Users must be able to scan ANY public container image, not just the pre-seeded catalog. Add a scan input where users can type any image ref (e.g. 'manzilrahul/k8s-custom-controller', 'nginx:latest', 'ghcr.io/owner/repo:tag') and trigger a scan.
requirements: Add a prominent 'Scan Image' input/button on the directory page
Accept any valid image reference (Docker Hub shorthand, GHCR, ECR public, Chainguard, etc.)
Support async scanning with progress indication (job status polling)
After scan completes, redirect to the image detail page
Show scan errors clearly (auth failures, image not found, timeout)
Rename 'Search repository, tag, digest, or image ID' to be clearly a filter/search for existing results, separate from the scan input

milestones.title: Comparison Target UX
milestones.description: The comparison tab says 'Choose another stored image' but it's unclear which images are available or what to compare against. Improve the comparison UX.
requirements: Show a clear list of comparable images (same repository, different tags)
Pre-select the most logical comparison target (e.g. previous tag, 'latest' vs current)
If no comparison candidates exist, explain why and suggest scanning another tag first
Show a summary preview before running the comparison

milestones.title: Fix Vulnerability Display
milestones.description: Vulnerabilities tab shows 'No vulnerabilities matched the current filters' even when vulnerabilities exist. The severity filter defaults may be hiding results. Also grype-vulnerabilities.json is only 3 bytes suggesting the scanner returned empty results.
requirements: Investigate why grype-vulnerabilities.json is 3 bytes (likely '[]' or '{}') - scanner may not be running correctly without binaries installed locally
Default filters should show ALL vulnerabilities, not pre-filter by severity
Show a clear message when scanner produced no results vs when filters hide results
Show scanner health status - indicate if grype/trivy binaries are available
Add a 'Reset filters' button

milestones.title: Responsive UI for Small Screens
milestones.description: The UI breaks on 13-14 inch laptops. Package tables overflow, dependency trees go out of bounds, and the overall layout is too wide.
requirements: Package table: add horizontal scroll, truncate long license lists with expand toggle
Dependency tree: constrain to container width, add horizontal scroll or collapse deeply nested nodes
StatCard grid: stack on smaller screens instead of 4-column
Tab sidebar: collapse to horizontal scroll on narrow viewports (already partially done)
Test all views at 1366x768 and 1440x900

milestones.title: Unified Image Version View
milestones.description: Alpine 3.19 and alpine:latest appear as separate entries in the directory. Users should see one entry per repository with version/tag selector inside the detail page.
requirements: Group images by repository in the directory listing
Show the latest scan as the primary entry, with a tag count badge
Inside image detail, add a version/tag switcher (dropdown or tabs) to navigate between alpine:latest and alpine:3.19 without going back to the directory
The Tags tab already lists related tags - consider promoting this to the header area

milestones.title: Attestation and Advisory Real Data
milestones.description: Attestation tab shows all zeros. Advisory tab shows no data. These features need to actually work for images that have attestations (e.g. chainguard images) and for VEX imports.
requirements: Test attestation discovery with images that have cosign signatures (e.g. cgr.dev/chainguard/static)
Ensure cosign binary is available or show clear status when it's not
Add a 'Import VEX' button in the Advisories tab so users can upload OpenVEX documents
Show example/instructions when no attestations or advisories exist
Consider auto-discovering attestations during scan rather than requiring a separate API call

milestones.title: Improve Directory Page UX
milestones.description: The directory page search label says 'Search repository, tag, digest, or image ID' which is confusing - users think it's for scanning new images. The page should clearly separate 'scan new' from 'filter existing'.
requirements: Rename search to 'Filter catalog' or 'Find in catalog'
Add a hero-level 'Scan a new image' CTA with an image ref input
Show scan status for in-progress scans (the job queue already supports this)
Add empty state for first-time users with no scanned images explaining how to get started

milestones.title: Scanner Health Dashboard
milestones.description: Users have no visibility into whether scanners (grype, trivy, cosign) are available and working. Add a health/status indicator.
requirements: Add a /api/v1/health or extend /healthz to report scanner binary availability
Show scanner status in the UI footer or settings area
Indicate in scan results which scanners actually ran vs which were unavailable
Show clear error when a scan produces no vulnerabilities because scanners aren't installed

bugs.title: scanners field null causes frontend crash
bugs.description: Backend returns null for scanners field when no vulnerability record exists. Frontend crashes with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading map)'.
bugs.fix: Added ?? [] guards in directory-page.tsx and image-detail-page.tsx

bugs.title: Dark mode input boxes invisible
bugs.description: Input fields use dark:bg-ink-950 but ink-950 was missing from tailwind config.

bugs.title: Advisories tab causes full screen blur
bugs.description: Clicking Advisories tab crashed due to null vex_documents, leaving only the backdrop-blur background visible.
bugs.fix: Added null safety guards for vex_documents and vulnerability_summary

bugs.title: Docker config missing breaks public image scans
bugs.description: Catalog scans fail in Docker container because ~/.docker/config.json doesn't exist. Public images should fall back to anonymous auth.
bugs.fix: keychain.go now returns authn.Anonymous when config file is missing

bugs.title: DB migrations not copied to Docker image
bugs.description: Dockerfile didn't COPY db/migrations/ to the final stage, causing postgres storage to fail on startup.

bugs.title: grype-vulnerabilities.json is 3 bytes
bugs.description: The grype scanner appears to return empty results. Likely because the grype binary is not installed in the local dev environment. Need to surface this to the user.

bugs.title: Registry name overflow in Overview StatCard
bugs.description: Long registry names like 'index.docker.io' overflow the StatCard and hide behind adjacent elements on small screens.

bugs.title: Dependency tree overflows container on small screens
bugs.description: Nested dependency tree cards push beyond the container boundary on 13-14 inch laptop screens.

iteration_order: M3 - Universal scanning (core value prop - users must be able to scan any image)
M5 - Fix vulnerability display (core feature broken)
M2 - Fix registry name overlap (quick UI fix)
M6 - Responsive UI (usability on real laptops)
M1 - JSON viewer for artifacts (better artifact exploration)
M7 - Unified image version view (reduce directory clutter)
M9 - Directory page UX (clearer scan vs filter separation)
M4 - Comparison target UX (guided comparison flow)
M8 - Attestation and advisory real data (feature completeness)
